purpose: Verify .pptx deliverables through file integrity, extracted slide text, media inventory, speaker notes, export compatibility, and narrative fit.
verificationAxes: pptx parse/open succeeds with slide count and order evidence
text extraction confirms visible copy and notes are inspectable
media inventory confirms expected images or charts exist
export or screenshot evidence checks text fit and visual overlap
narrative flow matches audience and acceptance criteria

blindSpotPatterns.description: PPTX verifier passes based on filename or intent without parsing, opening, or exporting the deck.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Verdict lacks parse/open/export evidence, slide count, and media/notes extraction.

blindSpotPatterns.description: PPTX verifier checks slide text but misses speaker notes leakage, missing notes, or export compatibility.
blindSpotPatterns.detector: Evidence lacks notes extraction and export/PDF/screenshot compatibility review.

repairStrategy: Repair the .pptx source deck, extracted source, or export workflow; do not claim compatibility without evidence.
improveStrategy: Add parser/export checks, media inventory checks, or note extraction requirements to the verifier harness.

sampleTasks.description: Verify a client .pptx deck for parseability, slide order, speaker notes, and export readability.
mustSelect: visual export or screenshot check when available
